query: SELECT id, submissionId, blastId, toEmail, fromEmail, subject, direction, sentAt FROM clientEmails WHERE blastId = 7 OR (sentAt >= '2026-05-14 11:00:00' AND direction = 'outbound') ORDER BY sentAt DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user e1gwTrcxzNkRAvq.27ee13ac78a5 --database aXnNnkD6gAXcPtQ6Yw2PQJ --execute SELECT id, submissionId, blastId, toEmail, fromEmail, subject, direction, sentAt FROM clientEmails WHERE blastId = 7 OR (sentAt >= '2026-05-14 11:00:00' AND direction = 'outbound') ORDER BY sentAt DESC LIMIT 10;
